description: Open the project '~/Documents/Energy3D/city-block.ng3'. Locate the tallest skyscraper in the model and place a Mirror object on its roof. Resize the mirror to approximately 10m x 10m. Configure the mirror to actively track the sun and reflect light downwards into the shaded street/lower building area by assigning it a Target. Enable 'Sun Rays' (from the View menu or toolbar) to visualize the optical path. Change the simulation date to the Winter Solstice (December 21) and the time to 12:00 PM. Adjust the camera to clearly show the skyscraper, the mirror, and the yellow sun rays bouncing down into the urban canyon. Take a screenshot of this setup and save it as '~/Documents/Energy3D/heliostat_rays.png'. Finally, save the modified project as '~/Documents/Energy3D/city-block-heliostat.ng3'.
